title: Chandrapur MSRTC Bus Stand Complete Guide | Timetable, Booking, Contact Number & Routes
author: Team SB MSRTC
excerpt: Complete Chandrapur Bus Stand guide with MSRTC timetable, online booking, Ghugus to Chandrapur bus timings, contact number, route-wise schedules, PDFs, and reservation details in English + Marathi.
content:
# Chandrapur MSRTC Bus Stand – Complete Timetable, Booking & Travel Guide

## Introduction | प्रस्तावना

**Chandrapur MSRTC Bus Stand** हा विदर्भातील एक अतिशय महत्त्वाचा बस स्थानक आहे. दररोज हजारो प्रवासी येथेून **MSRTC (ST Mahamandal)** बस सेवा वापरून Chandrapur, Ghugus, Wadsa, Aheri, Amravati, Nagpur, Bramhapuri आणि इतर शहरांकडे प्रवास करतात.

For official depot-wise details, Chandrapur Bus Stand information is also listed on the MSRTC public data portal:
👉 [Chandrapur Bus Stand Depot](CHANDRAPURBUSSTAND)

This guide is specially created for users searching for:

- **MSRTC booking**
- **MSRTC bus booking online**
- **Chandrapur Bus Stand timetable**
- **Ghugus to Chandrapur bus timings MSRTC**
- **MSRTC reservation & online reservation**

इथे तुम्हाला **आज, उद्या आणि नियमित वेळापत्रक**, contact number, PDF timetable, Shivneri booking info आणि ST Mahamandal details सगळं एकाच ठिकाणी मिळेल.

---

## Chandrapur Bus Stand Contact Number | संपर्क क्रमांक

**Chandrapur MSRTC Bus Stand Contact Number:**

- 📞 **07172-252345** (Enquiry Counter)
- 📞 **07172-252346** (Depot Office)

> 💡 टीप: सकाळी 7 ते रात्री 10 या वेळेत कॉल केल्यास माहिती लवकर मिळते.

Official depot listing (reference):
👉 [Chandrapur Bus Stand Depot Reference](CHANDRAPURBUSSTAND)

---

## Ghugus to Chandrapur Bus Timings MSRTC

**Ghugus to Chandrapur** हा Chandrapur district मधील सर्वात busy route आहे.

Ghugus Bus Stand is an officially listed MSRTC depot under Chandrapur tehsil:
👉 [Ghugus Bus Stand Depot](GHUGUSBUSSTAND)

### Ghugus → Chandrapur MSRTC Timetable

| Bus Type | First Bus | Last Bus | Travel Time |
|--------|-----------|----------|-------------|
| Ordinary ST | 05:00 AM | 10:00 PM | 35–45 mins |
| Express | 06:30 AM | 08:30 PM | 30 mins |

- Distance: ~25 km
- Fare: ₹15 – ₹25

मराठीत सांगायचं तर:
> **घुग्घुस ते चंद्रपूर ST बस दर अर्ध्या तासाला उपलब्ध असते**, त्यामुळे daily office आणि student प्रवासासाठी हा route perfect आहे.

---

## Nearby Important Bus Stands (Chandrapur District)

### Ballarshah / Ballarpur MSRTC Bus Stand

Ballarshah (Ballarpur) Bus Stand is another important MSRTC depot connecting Chandrapur with Telangana and central Maharashtra routes.

Official Ballarpur Bus Stand depot page:
👉 [Ballarpur Bus Stand Depot](BALLARPURBUSSTAND)

Common routes from Ballarshah:

- Ballarshah → Chandrapur
- Ballarshah → Nagpur
- Ballarshah → Adilabad

This depot works closely with **Chandrapur ST Mahamandal division** for long-distance and interstate connectivity.

---

## ST Mahamandal – Chandrapur Division

**ST Mahamandal (MSRTC)** Chandrapur division covers:

- Chandrapur Bus Stand (Main Depot)
- Ghugus Bus Stand
- Ballarshah (Ballarpur) Bus Stand
- Bramhapuri
- Wadsa
- Aheri

> ST Mahamandal buses are lifeline for rural Maharashtra.

---

## Final Words | निष्कर्ष

If you are traveling within Chandrapur district or planning a journey across Maharashtra, **MSRTC Chandrapur Bus Stand** offers reliable, affordable, and frequent bus services backed by officially listed depots and public MSRTC data sources.

मराठीत सांगायचं तर:
> **ST बस म्हणजे महाराष्ट्राची जीवनवाहिनी आहे** – आणि Chandrapur, Ghugus आणि Ballarshah हे त्याचे मजबूत दुवे आहेत.

---

*Last Updated: February 06, 2026*
